lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਭਾਗੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa bhaag hovai mukh masatak sadaa har ke gun gaeh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Perfect destiny is inscribed upon your forehead and face; sing the Praises of the Lord forever. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam bhojan har dee |
lines.english: The Lord bestows the Ambrosial Food of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਵਸਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan man maeh vasaae |
lines.english: Whoever enshrines the Guru's Feet within his mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਅਪਣੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis no apanee nadar karee |1|
lines.english: - only those who are blessed by God's Glance of Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਮਧੇ ਕੋਈ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: kott madhe koee viralaa lee |
lines.english: Out of millions, only a rare few receive it

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਅਨੑੇਰਾ ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh anaeraa andarahu jaae |
lines.english: is rid of pain and darkness from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee baanee siau laae piaar |
lines.english: So embrace love for the Word of the Guru's Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape saachaa le milaae |2|
lines.english: The True Lord unites him with Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਓਥੈ ਏਹੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aithai othai ehu adhaar |
lines.english: Here and hereafter, this is your only Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੇਵੈ ਸਿਰਜਨਹਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape devai sirajanahaar |3|
lines.english: The Creator Lord Himself bestows it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਮਨਾਏ ਅਪਣਾ ਭਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa manaae apanaa bhaanaa |
lines.english: One whom the Lord inspires to accept His Will,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਭਗਤੁ ਸੁਘੜੁ ਸੋੁਜਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: soee bhagat sugharr soujaanaa |
lines.english: is a wise and knowing devotee.

lines.translit: naanak tis kai sad kurabaanaa |4|7|17|7|24|
lines.english: Nanak is forever a sacrifice to him. ||4||7||17||7||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਬਿਭਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 4 bibhaas |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Fourth Mehl, Bibhaas:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਕਿ ਰਸਕਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਹ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਉਨਮਨਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: rasak rasak gun gaavah guramat liv unaman naam lagaan |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord with joyous love and delight; I am enraptured, lovingly attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਆ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਮ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: amrit ras peea gurasabadee ham naam vittahu kurabaan |1|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I drink in the Ambrosial Essence; I am a sacrifice to the Naam. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੇ ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: hamare jagajeevan har praan |
lines.english: The Lord, the Life of the World, is my Breath of Life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਊਤਮੁ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਭਾਇਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੰਤੁ ਦੀਓ ਹਰਿ ਕਾਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har aootam rid antar bhaaeo gur mant deeo har kaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lofty and Exalted Lord became pleasing to my heart and my inner being, when the Guru breathed the Mantra of the Lord into my ears. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਕਰਹੁ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਦਾਨ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kit bidh kiau paaeeai prabh apunaa mo kau karahu upades har daan |2|
lines.english: How am I to find my God? Please bless me with the Gift of the Lord's Teachings. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu sant milahu mere bhaaee mil har har naam vakhaan |
lines.english: Come, O Saints: let us join together, O Siblings of Destiny; let us meet and chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਜਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat meh har har vasiaa mil sangat har gun jaan |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, abides in the Society of the Saints; joining this Sangat, the Lord's Glories are known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਰਸਿ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag satasangat paaee gur satigur paras bhagavaan |3|
lines.english: By great good fortune, the Society of the Saints is found. Through the Guru, the True Guru, I receive the Touch of the Lord God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਹ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਗਮ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ਰਹੇ ਹੈਰਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavah prabh agam tthaakur ke gun gaae rahe hairaan |
lines.english: I sing the Glorious Praises of God, my Inaccessible Lord and Master; singing His Praises, I am enraptured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਗੁਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਓ ਖਿਨ ਦਾਨ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kau gur kirapaa dhaaree har naam deeo khin daan |4|1|
lines.english: The Guru has showered His Mercy on servant Nanak; in an instant, He blessed him with the Gift of the Lord's Name. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਗਵੈ ਸੂਰੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਸਭ ਰੈਨਿ ਸਮੑਾਲਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: augavai soor guramukh har boleh sabh rain samaaleh har gaal |
lines.english: With the rising of the sun, the Gurmukh speaks of the Lord. All through the night, he dwells upon the Sermon of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਹਮ ਲੋਚ ਲਗਾਈ ਹਮ ਕਰਹ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hamarai prabh ham loch lagaaee ham karah prabhoo har bhaal |1|
lines.english: My God has infused this longing within me; I seek my Lord God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਧੂਰਿ ਰਵਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: meraa man saadhoo dhoor ravaal |
lines.english: My mind is the dust of the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਕਉ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਅੰਧਾਰੀ ਮੋਹਿ ਫਾਥੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: saakat kau din rain andhaaree mohi faathe maaeaa jaal |
lines.english: Dark are the days and nights of the faithless cynics; they are caught in the trap of attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਗੁਰ ਪਗ ਝਾਰਹ ਹਮ ਬਾਲ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam drirraaeo gur meetthaa gur pag jhaarah ham baal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Guru has implanted the Sweet Name of the Lord, Har, Har, within me. I dust the Guru's Feet with my hair. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਨ ਵਸਿਓ ਰਿਨਿ ਬਾਧੇ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਬਾਲ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: khin pal har prabh ridai na vasio rin baadhe bahu bidh baal |2|
lines.english: The Lord God does not dwell in their hearts, even for an instant; every hair of their heads is totally tied up in debts. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਮੀਠ ਲਗਾਨਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਏ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har naamaa har meetth lagaanaa gur kee sabad nihaal |3|
lines.english: The Lord's Name, and the Lord, seem sweet to me. Through the Word of His Shabad, the Guru has made me happy. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਮਤਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਪਾਈ ਹਉ ਛੂਟੇ ਮਮਤਾ ਜਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat mil mat budh paaee hau chhootte mamataa jaal |
lines.english: Joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, wisdom and understanding are obtained, and one is released from the traps of egotism and possessiveness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਬਾਰਿਕ ਗੁਰ ਅਗਮ ਗੁਸਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: ham baarik gur agam gusaaee gur kar kirapaa pratipaal |
lines.english: I am just a child; the Guru is the Unfathomable Lord of the World. In His Mercy, He cherishes and sustains me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਏ ਰਸਕ ਰਸੀਕ ॥
lines.translit: eik khin har prabh kirapaa dhaaree gun gaae rasak raseek |
lines.english: The Lord God showered me with His Mercy for an instant; I sing His Glorious Praises with joyous love and delight.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਭਉਜਲ ਡੁਬਦੇ ਕਾਢਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਾਲ ਗੁਪਾਲ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: bikh bhaujal ddubade kaadt lehu prabh gur naanak baal gupaal |4|2|
lines.english: I am drowning in the ocean of poison; O God, Guru, Lord of the World, please save Your child, Nanak. ||4||2||
